The top ten NFTs with the highest sales growth in 24 hours Data source: NFTGO

Headlines

The United States has raised its tariff rate on China to 104%

Golden Finance reported that according to FOX BUSINESS, the White House press secretary said that the additional tariff of 104% on China took effect at noon Eastern Time. The additional tariff of 104% will be levied from April 9.

              DeFi Hotspots

              1. Binance HODLer Airdrop Launches Babylon (BABY)

              Golden Finance reported that according to the official announcement, Binance HODLer Airdrop has now launched the 14th project - Babylon (BABY), supporting direct self-custodial BTC staking on the Bitcoin network to enhance the security of the POS blockchain. From 08:00 on March 7, 2025 to 07:59 on March 13, 2025 (GMT+8), users who use BNB to purchase guaranteed coin earning (regular and/or current) or on-chain coin earning products will receive airdrop allocations. HODLer airdrop information is expected to be online within 12 hours, and new tokens will be distributed to users' spot wallets at least 1 hour before trading begins. Binance will list BABY at 18:00 on April 10, 2025 (GMT+8), and open trading pairs for USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD and TRY, subject to seed tag trading rules. BABY recharge channel will be open in 6 hours.

              2. The US SEC filed a new motion in the Ripple lawsuit and stated that the case is still on appeal

              Golden Finance reported that the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filed a new motion to oppose the emergency request filed by non-party Justin W. Keener in the Ripple case to submit "decisive evidence" in favor of the defendant. The SEC believes that since the case has been moved to the Second Circuit Court, the local court has lost jurisdiction and cannot accept Keener's request. In addition, the SEC pointed out that Keener did not comply with the appropriate legal provisions because he did not file a formal motion to intervene.

                3. Data: Ethereum has only outperformed Bitcoin 15% of the time since its launch

                Golden Finance reported that since the launch of Ethereum, its performance has only outperformed Bitcoin for 15% of the trading days. Since Ethereum began trading in mid-2015, it has underperformed Bitcoin 85% of the time. Analyst James Check shared this data on the X platform on April 8. The data provided by Check shows that Ethereum significantly outperformed Bitcoin in the early stages from 2015 to mid-2017. In addition, the Ethereum-to-Bitcoin ratio briefly favored Ethereum in late 2019 and early 2020. However, Bitcoin has outperformed Ethereum over the past five years.

                  4. Aave launches token repurchase mechanism, with a repurchase budget of $4 million in the first month

                  On April 9, according to Aave's official governance page, Aave DAO proposed to authorize the Finance Committee (AFC) to authorize $4 million worth of aEthUSDT to launch the first phase of the Aavenomics repurchase and distribution plan. The plan was approved. The program aims to repurchase AAVE from the open market and distribute it to the ecosystem reserve, thereby enhancing governance incentives and protocol health. This initial authorization will support approximately one month of repurchase operations, while reserving buffer time for the future deployment of new Aave Swapper contracts. The full program is expected to continue to advance at a pace of up to $1 million per week over six months. The proposal enables the AFC to begin executing the first phase of the repurchase program, approving $4 million in aEthUSDT for approximately one month of AAVE repurchases. By setting an authorized amount rather than a direct transfer, the proposal ensures the security of funds while allowing the AFC to efficiently execute repurchases within the scope of governance approval, helping to steadily advance the implementation of Aavenomics.

                    5.M^0's stablecoin platform has been launched on Solana

                    Golden Finance reported that Solana posted on the social platform that it has launched M^0's stablecoin platform. KAST will build the first stablecoin supported by M^0 on Solana to unlock new digital dollar use cases for payments and savings. The integrators working with them include Spree Finance, Squads, Jito and Perena.

                      Disclaimer: As a blockchain information platform, Golden Finance publishes articles for information reference only and is not intended as actual investment advice. Please establish a correct investment concept and be sure to increase risk awareness.
